title: Bindings, Scope, Closures, and Lifetime
description: Build configurable counters and validators without leaking mutable state across community-service widgets. Learners cumulatively produce a closure-backed state and validation library through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Choose const, let, or legacy var from reassignment, scope, and initialization behavior.
Resolve names through lexical environments and identify shadowing without guessing from call order.
Predict declaration instantiation, function hoisting, and temporal dead-zone failures.
